lines: Izina ryiza rihebuje Rinezeza amatwi yanjye  nzajya ndihimbaza ntahwema  ndivuge nirya Yesu.
Yesu ndamukunda,  Yesu ndamukunda,  ndamukundira y’uko yabanje kunkunda atyo.
Kok’iryo zina rinyibutsa uko yankunz’ akampfira Ababi nkanjy ’akabeza de Mur’ayo maraso ye.
Rimbwira Data wa twese ibyo yanshyinguriye mu ijuru naho nagenda mu mwijima rimurikira hose.
Rinyeyurir’umubabaro, rihanagur’amarira rinyongorera  ngo mpumure ngo ntinyuke,nkomere.
Izina nkunda  n’irya Yesu Risumb’uko turivuga ntawo mw’ isi warisingiza  uburyo buhagije
